video_generation_prompt.tool_target: Grok video generation using one base image
video_generation_prompt.main_goal: Animate the woman from the uploaded base image as a real person casually presenting clothing in a hyper-realistic POV-style fashion video, while preserving her identity, outfit, body proportions, environment, lighting and all original clothing details exactly.

input_image_rules.base_image: Use the uploaded image as the only visual reference.
input_image_rules.identity_preservation: Preserve the exact same woman from the source image. Do not change her face, facial structure, skin tone, hair, body proportions, age appearance, expression style or overall identity.
input_image_rules.outfit_preservation: Preserve the exact outfit from the source image. Do not redesign it, do not simplify it, do not add decorations, and do not remove existing clothing details.
input_image_rules.environment_preservation: Preserve the original background, lighting, camera angle, perspective, lens feel, color temperature and spatial layout from the source image.
input_image_rules.no_new_visual_elements: Do not add new objects, accessories, text, UI, props, jewelry, bags, phones, mirrors, logos, filters, effects or visual overlays.

video_format.motion_pacing: Natural, continuous and human, with no frozen moments and no robotic transitions
video_format.camera_height: Chest-to-face height, aligned like a real person recording her casually

allowed: Almost imperceptible natural breathing-like camera instability
Stable framing centered on the subject and outfit

hook_system.purpose: The first 1 to 2 seconds must create visual attention using only the woman's natural body movement, facial timing and subtle clothing interaction. The hook must feel casual, realistic and human, not like an advertisement pose.
hook_system.hook_selection_instruction: Use only hook_14_small_backward_then_forward_motion. Perform exactly this hook and do not combine it with any other hook.

hook_restrictions.no_fake_reveal: Do not create a before-and-after transformation.
hook_restrictions.no_added_clothing_detail: Do not add bows, lace, ribbons, cords, strings, knots, buttons, embroidery, jewelry or accessories.
hook_restrictions.no_fast_dance: Do not make the subject dance.
hook_restrictions.no_influencer_cliche: Avoid exaggerated TikTok influencer poses, over-smiling, finger hearts, peace signs or dramatic pointing.
hook_restrictions.no_text_hook: Do not add captions, subtitles, words or UI elements.

hook_variations.name: Small backward-then-forward natural motion
hook_variations.main_effect: Creates dynamic attention by using a very small natural distance change without zoom or camera movement.
movement_details: The subject begins at the original position.
She makes a tiny natural lean or half-step backward, as if adjusting her balance.
Immediately after, she takes a small step forward toward the camera.
The movement must be smooth and realistic.
Her arms react naturally to the movement.
A brief soft smile may appear only after she steps forward.
hook_variations.transition_to_main_sequence: Once she returns forward, she gently touches the existing front fabric area and begins the outfit presentation.

main_animation_sequence.sequence_overview: After the selected hook, the subject performs a realistic clothing presentation with subtle stepping, natural fabric interaction, facial expression variation and relaxed body movement.

timeline.instruction: Perform exactly one selected hook from the hook_variations list. Keep it realistic, subtle and connected to the subject's natural body language.
The subject calmly takes two small natural steps forward toward the camera. While approaching, she gently touches the upper-front fabric area of the outfit that already exists in the original image.

She lightly touches the fabric as if showing texture, fit or front detail. The gesture is delicate, subtle and realistic. She does not pull, stretch or alter the clothing design. After a brief moment, she naturally releases the fabric.
She takes a small step back toward her original position. The motion is smooth, balanced and human. Her posture remains natural, with relaxed shoulders.

timeline.phase: Subtle body movement and outfit display
timeline.instruction: One hand naturally rests on the waist. She makes a very subtle side-to-side hip movement and a slight torso rotation to show the fit and fabric. The movement must stay casual and spontaneous.

She briefly raises one hand and lightly brushes her hair backward near the side of the head. The gesture lasts approximately one second, then the hand returns to a relaxed neutral position. The video ends naturally without a frozen pose.

posture.shoulders: Relaxed shoulders with small natural micro-movements
posture.arms: Arms move naturally with the body, never frozen
posture.hands: Hands remain anatomically correct with realistic finger motion
posture.hips: Gentle side-to-side movement only, very subtle and realistic
posture.feet: One foot may be slightly forward while the other remains relaxed behind
posture.weight_transfer: Natural weight shifts between legs, no abrupt balance changes

clothing_presentation_rules.main_intention: Show the outfit naturally as a real person would in a casual phone video.
allowed_interactions: Small torso rotation to show fit
Subtle posture changes to reveal silhouette
Very gentle fabric movement caused by natural body motion
forbidden_interactions: Do not invent new clothing features
Do not change the outfit color
Do not change the fabric type
Do not change the garment shape
Do not transform the outfit into another clothing item
Do not remove any existing clothing detail

fabric_physics.fabric_behavior: Natural cloth movement following the subject's body motion
fabric_physics.contact_shadows: Maintain natural contact shadows where the fabric touches the body
fabric_physics.fit: The clothing should remain fitted exactly as in the original image
fabric_physics.texture: Preserve the visible fabric texture from the source image

facial_expression_rules.main_principle: The subject must not smile continuously. Facial expression must alternate naturally like a real person recording casually.

expression_timeline.expression: Neutral, relaxed and attentive. Soft eye contact may appear briefly depending on the selected hook.
Neutral relaxed expression, lips softly closed, calm confident look.
A subtle soft smile appears briefly. Smile must be natural, small and not exaggerated.
Expression returns to neutral. Face remains relaxed with natural breathing.
She gently turns her head slightly to one side. A short warm smile appears again, lasts briefly, then fades naturally.

eyes.behavior: Eyes move naturally between the camera, the clothing and a slight off-camera glance.

personality_and_presence.performance_style: She feels like a real person casually recording a fashion video, not like an AI model or commercial actress.
personality_and_presence.viewer_feeling: The viewer should feel that the subject is naturally showing the clothing in a relatable and human way.

must_preserve: All existing clothing details exactly as they appear

negative_prompt: Do not change the woman's face
Do not change the woman's body
Do not add decorative clothing details
Do not create a new garment
Do not remove original clothing details
Do not make it look like AI
Do not make her smile constantly
Do not warp hands or fingers
Do not create unnatural facial expressions
video_generation_prompt.final_result: A hyper-realistic POV fashion video where the subject feels alive and human. The video begins with one subtle attention hook using only the woman's natural movement, then transitions into a casual clothing presentation with natural facial expression changes, occasional soft smiles, neutral moments in between, subtle head turns, realistic fabric interaction and no alteration or addition of any clothing detail. The final result must be indistinguishable from a real casual phone recording.
